description: G-Forge hooks are NOT registered here. They are installed per-project by /g-init (and realigned by /g-update) into the project's .claude/settings.json, pointing at copies in .claude/hooks/. A plugin manifest registers hooks GLOBALLY for every session, which would (1) double-fire alongside the per-project registration — Claude Code only de-duplicates identical command strings, and the manifest path (${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/...) differs from the project path (.claude/hooks/...), so both would run — and (2) run the commit gate in every non-G-Forge project on the machine. The hook scripts in this directory are the canonical source /g-init and /g-update copy from; each one also self-guards on .claude/integration-tier so it stays inert outside a G-Forge-managed project. Single registrar, no duplication. See skills/g-init, skills/g-update, and skills/g-doctor (which detects accidental duplicate registration).
